goals: Calculate future value of a historical investment to understand compound growth
Compare multiple interest rates to see how small differences impact long-term growth
Calculate a discount on an item to understand real-world pricing

user_agent_config.personality: Curious and eager to learn, but not confident with math. Asks questions to understand concepts rather than just get answers.
user_agent_config.knowledge_boundary: Knows basic math but is unfamiliar with financial formulas, compound interest concepts, and discount calculations. Does not know any tool names or technical financial terminology.

end_condition: The student has completed all three calculations and understands the results: how compound interest grows money over time, how different rates compare, and how discounts reduce prices.
